events.text: Goal! Senegal 1, Iraq 0. Habib Diarra (Senegal) right footed shot from very close range to the top right corner. Assisted by Abdoulaye Seck following a corner.
Rebin Sulaka (Iraq) is shown the red card.
Substitution, Iraq. Munaf Younus replaces Ahmed Qasem.
Abdoulaye Seck (Senegal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Iraq. Jalal Hassan replaces Ahmed Basil because of an injury.
Goal! Senegal 2, Iraq 0. Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Lamine Camara.
Substitution, Senegal. Iliman Ndiaye replaces Ibrahim Mbaye.
Substitution, Senegal. Nicolas Jackson replaces Lamine Camara.
Substitution, Senegal. Pape Gueye replaces Habib Diarra.
Substitution, Iraq. Ahmed Maknzi replaces Ali Jasim.
Substitution, Iraq. Ali Yousif replaces Ali Al Hamadi.
Substitution, Senegal. Pathé Ciss replaces Abdoulaye Seck.
Goal! Senegal 3, Iraq 0. Pape Gueye (Senegal) left footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Ismaïla Sarr.
Substitution, Iraq. Kevin Yakob replaces Zidane Iqbal.
Goal! Senegal 4, Iraq 0. Pape Gueye (Senegal) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Iliman Ndiaye with a headed pass.
Amir Al Ammari (Iraq) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Senegal. Assane Diao replaces Ismaïla Sarr.
Pape Gueye (Senegal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Senegal 5, Iraq 0. Iliman Ndiaye (Senegal) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Pape Gueye.
Merchas Doski (Iraq) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
